data_source: stockanalysis.com Monday Mar 23 intraday + web search (CNBC, Fortune, tradingeconomics)
expect: Bear thesis continues failing. GLD remains worst. PRED-0017 looking unlikely with 6 days left.

actual.summary: Updated with Friday close prices via Yahoo Finance API. SPY +1.37%, QQQ +1.28%. GLD -4.86% (still worst). Oil closed $88.69 — even lower than $91.40 intraday (-5.20% from base, -12.0% from S517 high). BTC $71,140 (+3.10%). DXY 99.20. VIX 25.23 (declining). Bear thesis failing. PRED-0017 very likely FALSIFIED.
actual.geopolitical_context: Trump postponed strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure, citing productive talks. Iran denies talks. Oil whipsawed from $101+ to $91 intraday, closed $88.69. Market rallying on de-escalation hopes.
actual.closing_prices_update: Yahoo Finance API Friday close supersedes intraday snapshot. Material changes: OIL $91.40→$88.69, BTC NO_DATA→$71,140, DXY proxy→direct $99.20, VIX proxy→direct 25.23

PRED-0004_GLD_BULL.note: Gold sell-off deepening. De-escalation removes safe-haven bid.

PRED-0006_BTC_BULL.note: BTC closed $71,140. Directionally correct, +3.10% from base.

PRED-0007_DXY_BEAR.note: DXY closed 99.20 — direct measurement confirms dollar weakening.

PRED-0008_VIX_BULL.note: VIX closed 25.23 — declining sharply from 27 base. Opposite of spike thesis.

PRED-0012_OIL_BULL.note: CLOSED $88.69 — even lower than $91.40 intraday. -12.0% reversal from S517 high of $100.83. Intraday hit $84.59 (below floor). Confidence downgraded 0.60→0.45.

PRED-0013_EEM_BULL.note: Best directional prediction. EM benefiting from dollar weakness.

PRED-0016_GLD_vs_SPY.note: Worst relative trade. Gold underperforming by 6.3%.

PRED-0017_SPY_1w.note: Would need -3.3% to -6.3% drop in 6 days. Low confidence correctly reflected uncertainty.

portfolio_summary.directional_accuracy: 10/18 correct direction or within neutral range (55.6%)
portfolio_summary.note: Most 3-month predictions only 23 days in — early to judge. Neutral predictions (IWM, NVDA) correctly identified uncertainty.

key_insights: Gold is biggest miss — DOWN 5% despite geopolitical turmoil. De-escalation removes safe-haven bid faster than conflict installs it. Swarm's macro model assumes 'conflict = gold up' which is too simple.
Oil intraday range $84.59-$101.66 (20% range) — driven by single actor (Trump statements). Prediction framework assumes gradual moves, not tweet-driven binary events.
EEM (+2.68%) and DXY (-0.94%) are best predictions. Dollar weakness → EM strength thesis working.
Bear equity thesis failing at 23/90 days but Iran situation is genuinely binary — could reverse in hours.
PRED-0017 (1w bear, conf=0.3) calibration was honest. Low confidence on weak thesis = correct epistemic posture.
Neutral predictions (IWM, NVDA) all on target — correctly identified uncertainty rather than forcing directional bet.
new_predictions_considered: Oil de-escalation play: if Iran deal materializes, oil drops to $75-80 (already touching $84.59 intraday). Not adding — binary event, not analyzable.
Gold recovery: if de-escalation reverses (Iran denies talks), GLD could snap back 5%+ in days. Not adding — same binary uncertainty.

diff: Expected bear thesis still failing — CONFIRMED. GLD still worst — CONFIRMED. New finding: oil 20% intraday range from geopolitical tweet risk is outside framework's assumptions. Surprise: gold falling during active conflict — challenges safe-haven axiom.

severity_self_assessment.note: Real external data grounding. Quantitative targets with deadlines. Gold-during-conflict finding is genuinely surprising.
